Quality Assurance

Every gemstone and mineral we sell is sourced authentically and verified by India's most trusted gemological and geotechnical laboratories.

🏅
✓ Verified
ADGL International
All Dimensions Gemological Laboratory
India's premier gemological laboratory providing internationally recognised certificates for precious and semi-precious stones. Our garnet carries ADGL certification No. GSS-3846.
Gemological Grading Cut & Weight Origin Verification Clarity Assessment
📄 View Certificate →
🔬
✓ Verified
Vishwas Geotech
Vishwas Geotech Pvt. Ltd., Ahmedabad
Accredited technical consultancy and civil engineering laboratory performing comprehensive chemical analysis of rocks and minerals. Report No. VGPL/2023/Rock/Chem/006.
Chemical Analysis SiO₂ Purity Testing Specific Gravity Hardness Grading
📄 View Certificate →
💎
✓ Follows
GIA Standards
Gemological Institute of America Guidelines
All our gemstone grading follows internationally accepted GIA standards for the 4 Cs — Cut, Colour, Clarity and Carat weight — ensuring globally recognised quality benchmarks.
4C Grading International Standard Colour Grading Clarity Scale

✓ Guaranteed
Natural Guarantee
100% Natural, Untreated, Authentic
We guarantee that every stone sold is 100% natural, ethically sourced, and free from synthetic treatments. Inclusions visible in our stones are proof of natural origin — not defects.
No Synthetic No Heat Treatment Ethically Sourced Natural Inclusions
